vocab.meaning: sự hối hả và nhộn nhịp
vocab.example: While many enjoy the hustle and bustle of city views, I find them a bit overwhelming for a long stay.

vocab.meaning: một làn gió mới (nghĩa bóng: sự thay đổi sảng khoái)
vocab.example: Moving from the city to the countryside for a weekend is a breath of fresh air, both literally and figuratively.

vocab.meaning: nơi xa xôi hẻo lánh, cách biệt hoàn toàn
vocab.example: I adore views in the middle of nowhere, where the only thing you can see for miles is the natural landscape.

vocab.meaning: một bữa tiệc mãn nhãn (cảnh đẹp rực rỡ)
vocab.example: The neon lights of a metropolitan skyline at night are a real feast for the eyes.
The serene, rolling hills of the rural north are a far cry from the cramped, smoggy vistas of the downtown area.
Looking at rural views makes me feel at one with nature, which is something I can't experience in a city.

vocab.meaning: khu rừng bê tông (mô tả đô thị ngột ngạt)
vocab.example: I've spent my whole life in the concrete jungle, so I've grown to appreciate the gritty beauty of industrial views.

vocab.meaning: mệt mỏi với thế sự (cần cảnh đẹp để chữa lành)
vocab.example: When I feel world-weary, a simple view of a quiet lake in the countryside helps me recharge my batteries.

vocab.meaning: thứ chướng tai gai mắt (cảnh vật xấu xí)
vocab.example: I prefer rural views because I find many modern urban developments to be a bit of an eyesore.

vocab.word: as far as the eye can see
vocab.ipa: /æz fɑːr æz ði aɪ kən siː/
vocab.meaning: xa tận chân trời/ngút tầm mắt
vocab.example: In the countryside, the fields stretch out as far as the eye can see, giving a profound sense of openness.
